message:
refactor(scheduler): extract WorkerCoordinator and add local-task steal-safety test

Encapsulate worker-waking logic into a dedicated WorkerCoordinator struct
to reduce the surface area of ThreeLaneScheduler and ThreeLaneWorker.

- Extract WorkerCoordinator holding parkers + round-robin next_wake counter
- Replace raw Vec<Parker> + AtomicUsize with Arc<WorkerCoordinator>
- Route ThreeLaneWaker and CancelLaneWaker through coordinator.wake_one()
- Add test_spawn_local_not_stolen verifying local-only tasks cannot be
  work-stolen across threads

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
